channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [TIMESGTY] Team India Guaranty Ltd. Defers Preferential Allotment and Acquisition of 4A Financial Technologies Private Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Team India Guaranty Ltd. announced that the Board of Directors, at their meeting on March 4, 2026, considered the proposal for preferential allotment of equity shares to non-promoters. The allotment was approved by shareholders at the Annual General Meeting held on September 12, 2025. However, due to receiving only 62.14% of the requisite consideration in the form of shares from the proposed allottee, the proposed allotment cannot be completed at this stage. The acquisition of 4A Financial Technologies Private Limited is also deferred. The Company may revisit the proposal in the future, with no change in the paid-up equity share capital.

  • Team India Guaranty Ltd. defers preferential allotment of equity shares to non-promoters.
  • Only 62.14% of the requisite consideration received in the form of shares from the proposed allottee.
  • Acquisition of 4A Financial Technologies Private Limited is also deferred.
  • Company may revisit the proposal in the future.
  • No change in the paid-up equity share capital.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TIMES GUARANTY LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [ICICIGI] ICICI Lombard Acquires 0.03% Stake in Reliance Industries for ₹0.40 Billion
item.description:
ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Ltd. has acquired a 0.03% stake in Reliance Industries Limited for ₹0.40 billion. The acquisition, which does not constitute a related party transaction, was made in the ordinary course of investment. The investment is not outside the mainline of business of the listed entity. No governmental or regulatory approvals were required for the acquisition. The investment was made in multiple tranches over a period of time, with the last acquisition made on March 4, 2026. Reliance Industries Limited is an Indian conglomerate with businesses in energy, petrochemicals, natural gas, retail, telecommunications, mass media, and textiles. It was incorporated in India on May 8, 1973, and has a significant presence in the country.

  • ICICI Lombard acquires 0.03% stake in Reliance Industries
  • Investment made in the ordinary course of business
  • Transaction does not constitute a related party transaction
  • Investment made in multiple tranches over a period of time
  • Reliance Industries is a conglomerate with businesses in various sectors

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [SBILIFE] SBI Life Insurance Company Ltd. Receives Rectification Order Reducing Tax Demand by Rs. 4846.30 Crore
item.description:
🔥 Trending

SBI Life Insurance Company Ltd. has received a rectification order from the Deputy Commissioner of Income Tax, Circle 1(3)1, Mumbai, reducing the tax demand and interest as per the rectification order passed by the Tax Authority. The company had filed a rectification application under section 154 of the Income Tax Act, 1961, due to incorrect calculation of tax demand and interest by the Income Tax Department in the original assessment order. The rectified tax demand stands at Rs. 315.84 crore, with an interest of Rs. 155.04 crore, totaling to Rs. 470.88 crore for FY 2021-2022. The company had earlier disclosed a tax demand of Rs. 5317.18 crore on March 30, 2024. SBI Life Insurance Company Ltd. has filed an appeal at Commissioner Appeals against the original order and will submit the rectification order before the appellate authority.

  • SBI Life Insurance Company Ltd. receives rectification order reducing tax demand by Rs. 4846.30 crore.
  • The Tax Authority had incorrectly calculated the tax demand and interest in the original assessment order.
  • The rectified tax demand stands at Rs. 315.84 crore with an interest of Rs. 155.04 crore, totaling to Rs. 470.88 crore for FY 2021-2022.
  • The company had earlier disclosed a tax demand of Rs. 5317.18 crore on March 30, 2024.
  • SBI Life Insurance Company Ltd. has filed an appeal at Commissioner Appeals against the original order and will submit the rectification order before the appellate authority.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SBI Life Insurance Company Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [GALAGEX] Galaxy Agrico Exports Ltd Rights Issue Approved: 1,31,59,655 Shares Allotted
item.description:
🔥 Trending

The Rights Issue Committee of Galaxy Agrico Exports Ltd met on March 04, 2026, and reviewed applications from 273 non-eligible shareholders and those with zero rights entitlement. After evaluation, the Committee approved the allotment of 1,31,59,655 Right Equity Shares, subject to approval from BSE Limited. The allotment will be made in compliance with applicable laws and regulations.

  • Rights Issue Committee meeting held on March 04, 2026
  • Applications from 273 non-eligible shareholders and those with zero rights entitlement reviewed
  • 1,31,59,655 Right Equity Shares approved for allotment
  • Allotment subject to approval from BSE Limited
  • Allotment to be made in compliance with applicable laws and regulations

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GALAXY AGRICO EXPORTS LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [MUFIN] Mufin Green Finance Ltd. Allots Equity Shares and Warrants on Preferential Basis for Cash Consideration
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Mufin Green Finance Ltd. has allotted 2,49,30,765 equity shares and 76,53,061 warrants on a preferential basis for cash consideration. The equity shares have a face value of Re. 1 each and were issued at a price of Rs. 98 per share, including a premium of Rs. 97. The warrants were also issued at a price of Rs. 98 per share. The allotment was approved by the Committee of Directors and the shareholders in their respective meetings. Post allotment, the paid-up equity share capital of the Company stands increased to Rs. 19,81,62,188.

  • Allotment of 2,49,30,765 equity shares and 76,53,061 warrants on a preferential basis.
  • Equity shares issued at a price of Rs. 98 per share, including a premium of Rs. 97.
  • Warrants issued at a price of Rs. 98 per share.
  • Approval of the Committee of Directors and the shareholders for the allotment.
  • Increase in the paid-up equity share capital of the Company to Rs. 19,81,62,188.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mufin Green Finance Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [LEHIL] Lotus Eye Hospital Fined Rs.2,17,120 Each by BSE & NSE
item.description:
Lotus Eye Hospital and Institute Ltd. has been imposed a fine of Rs.2,17,120 each by BSE Limited and National Stock Exchange of India Limited. This is in accordance with Schedule III of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 due to non-compliance of Regulation 17(1A). The company has already rectified this non-compliance pursuant to approval of the shareholders through Postal Ballot. The fine does not have a material impact on the financial operations of the listed entity.

  • Lotus Eye Hospital fined Rs.2,17,120 each by BSE & NSE
  • Fine imposed due to non-compliance of Regulation 17(1A) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
  • Non-compliance has been rectified pursuant to approval of the shareholders through Postal Ballot
  • No material impact on the financial operations of the listed entity
  • Fine pertains to the quarter ended December 31, 2025

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Lotus Eye Hospital And Institute Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [ADVAIT] Advait Energy Transitions Ltd Allots 5630 Equity Shares Following Warrant Conversion
item.description:
Advait Energy Transitions Ltd (Formerly Advait Infratech Limited) has allotted 5630 equity shares to non-promoter allottees following the conversion of warrants. The warrants, issued at a price of Rs. 1776 each, were convertible into an equal number of equity shares having a face value of Rs. 10 each. The allotment was approved by the Board of Directors in a circular resolution passed on March 04, 2026. The equity shares allotted rank pari-passu with the existing equity shares of the Company in all respects. The Issued and Paid-up equity share capital of the Company stands increased to Rs. 10,94,30,110/ - consisting of 1,09,43,011 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each.

  • Advait Energy Transitions Ltd allotted 5630 equity shares to non-promoter allottees.
  • The warrants were issued at a price of Rs. 1776 each and were convertible into an equal number of equity shares.
  • The allotment was approved by the Board of Directors in a circular resolution passed on March 04, 2026.
  • The equity shares allotted rank pari-passu with the existing equity shares of the Company.
  • The Issued and Paid-up equity share capital of the Company stands increased to Rs. 10,94,30,110/ - consisting of 1,09,43,011 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Advait Infratech Ltd | Category: Transmission of Shares

item.title: [TYCHE] Promoters of Tyche Industries Ltd Propose to Transfer Shares via Gift
item.description:
Tyche Industries Ltd promoters, G Ganesh Kumar, G Rama Raju, and G Vijaya Kumari, have disclosed a proposed inter-se transfer of shares through a gift. This transfer involves 1,880 equity shares, which constitutes 0.02% of the total paid-up share capital of the company. The transaction is exempted from making an open offer as per Regulation 10(1)(a)(ii) of the SEBI SAST Regulations, 2011. The proposed acquisition will not alter the aggregate holding of promoter and promoter group before and after the transaction.

  • Proposed inter-se transfer of 1,880 equity shares between promoters of Tyche Industries Ltd.
  • Transfer to be executed as a gift, with no consideration involved.
  • The proposed acquisition does not alter the aggregate holding of promoter and promoter group.
  • Exempted from making an open offer under Regulation 10(1)(a)(ii) of the SEBI SAST Regulations, 2011.
  • The transaction is a private arrangement between family promoters to streamline their assets.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TYCHE INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [PERSISTENT] Persistent Systems Completes Internal Group Restructuring with Share Purchase Agreement
item.description:
Persistent Systems Ltd. has executed a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) for the transfer of 100% shareholding of its stepdown subsidiary, Persistent Systems Poland Spotka z 0.0., from Persistent Systems Inc., USA to Aepona Group Limited, Ireland. This internal group restructuring is expected to be completed by March 31, 2026, with a cash consideration of PLN 8,819,650.00. Persistent Systems Poland Spétka z o.0. is engaged in software services, computer programming, and consultancy activities.

  • Persistent Systems Ltd. has signed a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) for the transfer of 100% shareholding of its stepdown subsidiary, Persistent Systems Poland Spotka z 0.0., from Persistent Systems Inc., USA to Aepona Group Limited, Ireland.
  • The transaction is a related party transaction at arm's length, with no promoter/promoter group/group companies having any interest in the entity being acquired.
  • Persistent Systems Poland Spétka z o.0. is engaged in software services, computer programming, and consultancy activities.
  • The expected completion date for the transaction is March 31, 2026, with a cash consideration of PLN 8,819,650.00.
  • Persistent Systems Poland Spétka z o.0. was acquired in April 2023, with last three years turnover as follows: FY’25: PLN 12,116,407, FY’24: PLN 12,758,912, and FY’23: Nil.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PERSISTENT SYSTEMS LTD. | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [FOSECOIND] Foseco India Ltd Submits Machine Readable Form of Financial Results for the Period Ended December 31, 2025
item.description:
Foseco India Ltd has submitted the Machine Readable Form / Legible copy of the financial results for the period ended December 31, 2025, in continuation of the submission made on February 25, 2026. The Company apologizes for the previous unintentional slip-up and assures that it will be prevented in the future. The financial results have been audited by Price Waterhouse Chartered Accountants LLP, who have opined that the standalone financial results give a true and fair view of the standalone net profit and other comprehensive income and other financial information of the Company for the year ended 31st December 2025.

  • Foseco India Ltd has submitted the Machine Readable Form / Legible copy of the financial results for the period ended December 31, 2025.
  • The Company apologizes for the previous unintentional slip-up and assures that it will be prevented in the future.
  • The financial results have been audited by Price Waterhouse Chartered Accountants LLP.
  • Price Waterhouse Chartered Accountants LLP has opined that the standalone financial results give a true and fair view of the standalone net profit and other comprehensive income and other financial information of the Company for the year ended 31st December 2025.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FOSECO INDIA LTD. | Category: Monthly Update
